name: Nazneen Suit Set
description: A sleek, straight-cut long kurta in a deep Midnight Black. Crafted from Dupion silk, it features a textured finish that catches the light beautifully. The design is highlighted by a striking V-neckline adorned with intricate cream-and-gold gota-patti work, with vertical lace detailing that adds structure and length to the silhouette. Matching straight-fit trousers in the same rich fabric, maintaining a seamless, monochromatic look from the neck down to ensure the focus remains on the exquisite dupatta. Breathtaking Rani Pink organza dupatta that provides a high-contrast pop of color. It features delicate floral bootis scattered throughout and is finished with a fine gold scalloped border, adding an ethereal and feminine touch to the bold suit. Sharp, regal, and authoritative. This set is for the woman who loves a 'power-dressing' approach to ethnic wear—combining traditional craftsmanship with a very modern, clean aesthetic.
specifications: Fabric - Dupion Silk (Kurta & Pants); Lightweight Soft net (Dupatta)
Color - Midnight Black (Base) with Rani Pink (Dupatta)
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Kurta, Pants, Dupatta)
Embroidery/Work Details - Intricate Gota-Patti neckline and sleeve borders; Vertical lace inserts; Floral embroidered bootis on the dupatta
Product Highlight - The stunning contrast between the structured black silk and the airy, vibrant pink organza
Customization - Only Size and Length of Product

name: Gul Suit Set
description:
Embrace vibrant minimalism with this stunning two-tone suit set. The kurta and straight-fit pants are crafted from a smooth, lustrous Pastel Pink silk blend that provides a beautiful structure and subtle shine. The straight-cut kurta features a simple round neck with an elegant Gotta Patti border outlining the yoke, calf and side seams. The "pop" is delivered by the contrasting sheer light yellow dupatta, finished with matching gold trim, offering a playful, modern twist to the traditional silhouette.

Ideal for Mehendi ceremonies, festive lunches, or anywhere you want to make a stylish, happy statement. Pair it with simple gold flats.
specifications: Color - Pastel Pink and Contrasting Light Yellow
No. of Components - Set of 3 (Kurta, Pants, Dupatta)
Embroidery Details - Minimal Gold Gotta Trim on Yoke and Calf and Dupatta Edges
Product Highlight - Pastel Color Combination and Luxurious Silk Texture
Customization - Only Size and Length Of Product
